title: getting-started
text: can install development version vegetablesSriLanka GitHub :

title: getting-started
code: library(vegetablesSriLanka) #> Registered S3 method overwritten by 'tsibble': #>   method               from  #>   as_tibble.grouped_df dplyr data("vegetables.srilanka") head(vegetables.srilanka) #> # A tibble: 6 × 5 #>   Date       Item  Type   Market   Price #>   <date>     <chr> <chr>  <chr>    <dbl> #> 1 2016-08-01 Beans Retail Dambulla   165 #> 2 2016-08-02 Beans Retail Dambulla   190 #> 3 2016-08-03 Beans Retail Dambulla   190 #> 4 2016-08-04 Beans Retail Dambulla   190 #> 5 2016-08-05 Beans Retail Dambulla   190 #> 6 2016-08-08 Beans Retail Dambulla   190 tail(vegetables.srilanka) #> # A tibble: 6 × 5 #>   Date       Item   Type      Market Price #>   <date>     <chr>  <chr>     <chr>  <dbl> #> 1 2026-03-03 Tomato Wholesale Pettah   120 #> 2 2026-03-04 Tomato Wholesale Pettah   120 #> 3 2026-03-05 Tomato Wholesale Pettah    80 #> 4 2026-03-06 Tomato Wholesale Pettah    90 #> 5 2026-03-09 Tomato Wholesale Pettah   120 #> 6 2026-03-10 Tomato Wholesale Pettah   120

title: getting-started
code: filled <- fillgaps_vegetable_prices(    data = vegetables.srilanka,    item = "Carrot",    market = "Dambulla",    type = "Retail"  ) filled #> # A tsibble: 3,509 x 5 [1D] #>    Date       Item   Type   Market   Price #>    <date>     <chr>  <chr>  <chr>    <dbl> #>  1 2016-08-01 Carrot Retail Dambulla   155 #>  2 2016-08-02 Carrot Retail Dambulla   155 #>  3 2016-08-03 Carrot Retail Dambulla   150 #>  4 2016-08-04 Carrot Retail Dambulla   145 #>  5 2016-08-05 Carrot Retail Dambulla   145 #>  6 2016-08-06 NA     NA     NA          NA #>  7 2016-08-07 NA     NA     NA          NA #>  8 2016-08-08 Carrot Retail Dambulla   125 #>  9 2016-08-09 Carrot Retail Dambulla   135 #> 10 2016-08-10 Carrot Retail Dambulla   150 #> # ℹ 3,499 more rows

title: getting-started
code: plot_vegetable_prices(    data = vegetables.srilanka,    item = "Carrot",    market = "Dambulla",    type = "Retail"  )

what: Fill gaps in vegetable price time series — fillgaps_vegetable_prices
title: Fill gaps in vegetable price time series — fillgaps_vegetable_prices
text: Fill missing gaps NA. function filters dataset based selected item, market, type, converts data tsibble, generates regular time series filling gaps NA.

title: Fill gaps in vegetable price time series — fillgaps_vegetable_prices
Fill gaps in vegetable price time series — fillgaps_vegetable_prices
text: data data frame containing vegetable price data. dataset must contain columns Date, Item, Type, Market, Price. item Character string specifying vegetable item. market Character string specifying market. type Character string specifying price type (e.g., "Retail" "Wholesale").

title: Fill gaps in vegetable price time series — fillgaps_vegetable_prices
text: ggplot object showing time series vegetable prices.

title: Fill gaps in vegetable price time series — fillgaps_vegetable_prices
code: fillgaps_vegetable_prices(   data = vegetables.srilanka,   item = "Carrot",   market = "Dambulla",   type = "Retail" ) #> # A tsibble: 3,509 x 5 [1D] #>    Date       Item   Type   Market   Price #>    <date>     <chr>  <chr>  <chr>    <dbl> #>  1 2016-08-01 Carrot Retail Dambulla   155 #>  2 2016-08-02 Carrot Retail Dambulla   155 #>  3 2016-08-03 Carrot Retail Dambulla   150 #>  4 2016-08-04 Carrot Retail Dambulla   145 #>  5 2016-08-05 Carrot Retail Dambulla   145 #>  6 2016-08-06 NA     NA     NA          NA #>  7 2016-08-07 NA     NA     NA          NA #>  8 2016-08-08 Carrot Retail Dambulla   125 #>  9 2016-08-09 Carrot Retail Dambulla   135 #> 10 2016-08-10 Carrot Retail Dambulla   150 #> # ℹ 3,499 more rows

what: Plot vegetable price time series — plot_vegetable_prices
title: Plot vegetable price time series — plot_vegetable_prices
text: Visualize retail wholesale vegetable prices time selected items markets Sri Lanka. function filters dataset based selected item, market, type, converts data tsibble, generates time series plot.

title: Plot vegetable price time series — plot_vegetable_prices
Plot vegetable price time series — plot_vegetable_prices
text: data data frame containing vegetable price data. dataset must contain columns Date, Item, Type, Market, Price. item Character string specifying vegetable item. market Character string specifying market. type Character string specifying price type (e.g., "Retail" "Wholesale").

title: Plot vegetable price time series — plot_vegetable_prices
text: ggplot object showing time series vegetable prices.

title: Plot vegetable price time series — plot_vegetable_prices
code: plot_vegetable_prices(   data = vegetables.srilanka,   item = "Carrot",   market = "Dambulla",   type = "Retail" )

what: Visualize missingness in vegetable price data — visualize_missingness
title: Visualize missingness in vegetable price data — visualize_missingness
text: Generates set visual summaries inspect data structure missing values dataset. function returns: (1) data type visualization, (2) missingness map, (3) missing percentage grouping variable.

title: Visualize missingness in vegetable price data — visualize_missingness
Visualize missingness in vegetable price data — visualize_missingness
text: data data frame. group_var Character string specifying grouping variable missing percentage visualization (e.g., "Item"). target_var Character string specifying variable assess missingness (e.g., "Price").

title: Visualize missingness in vegetable price data — visualize_missingness
text: named list containing: data_structure: Data type visualization. missing_map: Missingness heatmap. missing_by_group: Bar plot missing percentages.

title: Visualize missingness in vegetable price data — visualize_missingness
